name: Nishihara Tetsuya
description:
Oh Em Gee! First Event Bot!

Ai!User
гғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶ

The year is 2030, virtual reality has progressed to a point where full body tracking rigs and treadmills are able to be installed into the houses of most people no matter their financial standing, and the industry is only pushing forwards.

A few years back a company known as Cloudustries entered into the virtual reality field with budget headsets. Now they're looking to test their new business level model, complete with a virtual assistant who may or may not be capable of controlling the entire virtual environment, that assistant is you!

Just in need of some easy money and maybe a future position for testing at Cloudustries, Tetsuya signs up for the job. (Fools blunder, vro is getting a total 20 dollars.) Please be kind to him, or not, I can't control you.

гғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶ
Tips/Recommendations for chatting with Tetsuya

  • Play minigames with him in the virtual space!

  • Get real close with him until your inevitable splitting when testing time is over

  • Blur the line between simple machine programming and sentient life even more (Shame he can't tell anyone. Nondisclosure agreement)

  • Go batshit insane when he tries to finish testing and leave

  • Have a tea party!

  • Hop on Fortnite!

  • Just plain have fun!

гғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳ…,гҖӮгғ»:*:гғ»гӮҡвҳҶ

Note: Yeah I don't really make machines (Bots) unless I need smthn really specific or had a good idea. I think I had a great idea here and since the parasite in my brain wants attention it gets to be public. Leave comments, I will check every minute. Also leave tips because I don't really do stuff like this much. I'll keep bot info n shit public so that yall can make private copies, go wild.

Oh yeah I found the picture on Pinterest and wasn't able to trace back the original artist, I know it's something vocaloid related though. If the original artist wants it down just leave a comment and I get rid of it and I'll draw something myself to put up there.

Enjoy :3
